svg.title: Full-suite data collection pipeline
svg.desc: Four-stage data pipeline: teleoperation demonstration feeds into multimodal capture, then automated processing, then cloud synchronisation for robot training.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does ROBOSPEC collect teleoperation data?')
sendPrompt('What sensors does ROBOSPEC use for data collection?')
sendPrompt('How does ROBOSPEC process collected data?')
sendPrompt('How does ROBOSPEC sync data to the cloud?')
